title: Chewy Q2 2022 Earnings Preview
text: Chewy was scheduled to announce Q2 2022 earnings results on Wednesday, September 1st, after market close. The consensus EPS estimate was -$0.01 (87.5% Y/Y improvement) and consensus revenue estimate was $2.17 billion (27.6% Y/Y growth). Analysts expected adjusted EBITDA of $34.8 million and gross margin of 27%. The preview period (mid-2022) represented a challenging time for pet retailers as pandemic tailwinds were fading and economies reopened. Investors were concerned about whether Chewy could maintain growth momentum as customer acquisition became more expensive and retention declined post-pandemic. The company was transitioning from pandemic-era growth at any cost to a more disciplined profitability approach.
